channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.title: [Gold Job] OPEN VACANCY FOR CH. ENG. ON GENERAL CARGO at

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A maritime company is seeking qualified 4AE/JEWK and ETO candidates for roles on Bulk, Container, Chemical, and LPG vessels. Successful applicants will join a dynamic fleet, contributing to safe and efficient operations at sea. This is an excellent opportunity for experienced marine professionals to advance their careers within the shipping industry.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 4AE/JEWK/ETO Job on Bulk/Container/LPG Vessels at Anglo-Eastern

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Urgent opening for experienced Chief Engineers and Chief Officers on a container vessel. Candidates must have completed a minimum of two contracts in the same rank. Promotion opportunities are available for Second Engineers with at least three completed contracts. The contract duration is 4 months. Joining is required very urgently.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer / Chief Officer Job on Container Vessel at Nereus Marine Group

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia
Description:

A Chief Engineer with unlimited COC (Home Country or UK) is required for a DP2 FSIV vessel operating under Saudi Aramco. The contract duration is 3 months on / 1 month off (unpaid). Minimum 48 months of experience as Chief Engineer on FCB, FSIV, Utility, Crew boat, or Offshore DP2 class vessels is necessary. Valid Marlins Test and all documents valid for over 12 months are required. Joining is ASAP once Saudi Aramco provisional approval is issued.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job - DP2 FSIV Vessel at Aavishka Marine Services

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Experienced Chief Engineers and Oceangoing Watchkeeping Engineers are sought for a new bulk carrier joining the fleet. Candidates must have at least 3-4 contracts of experience on Wärtsilä RT-flex58T-B main engines. Experience on bulk carriers is preferred. Proficiency in English, strong technical knowledge, and a commitment to safety and teamwork are required.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Watch Engineer Vacancy on Bulk Carrier at SEALIFE SHIPPING

item.description:
Location: Dubai
Description:

A Tug Engineer is sought for marine operations in Dubai. Responsibilities include operating, maintaining, and troubleshooting tugboat engines and machinery, performing inspections, and ensuring compliance with safety regulations. Requirements include valid STCW certification, relevant marine engineering certificates, and experience on tug vessels. Strong knowledge of diesel engines and troubleshooting skills are essential. Immediate joiners are preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Tug Engineer Job in Dubai at Stallion International

item.description:
Location: United Arab Emirates
Description:

A Chief Engineer position is available on a Cutter Suction Dredger operating in the United Arab Emirates. The role is permanent with a contract duration of 6 weeks, commencing on August 15, 2026. This opportunity involves several trips.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job - Cutter Suction Dredger at ORCA Crew Services

item.description:
Location: KSA
Description:

Qualified Chief Engineers with unlimited CE COC (STCW Code III/2) are sought for a SPJUB vessel operating on an Aramco project. A minimum of 2 years of experience as Chief Engineer on SPJUB vessels is required. Joining is contingent upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance. Salary is to be discussed. All documents must be valid for 12 months, and candidates should not hold a valid Saudi Iqama visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Vacancy on SPJUB Vessel (Aramco Project) at Aavishka Shipping Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

Seeking experienced 3rd or 4th Engineers for a Drillship position. Candidates require a valid Schengen visa (or exemption), a Marshall Islands Seaman Book, and License Endorsement. Further details are available upon CV submission.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd/4th Engineer Job - Drillship at MMH

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Technical Superintendent position is available for Tankers. Candidates with relevant experience are encouraged to apply. Further details and application instructions can be found via the provided link.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Technical Superintendent Job - Tankers at Direct Search Global
